<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me check what changed after_frame to see if anything changed
if last_transition and last_transition.before_frame and last_transition.after_frame:
    before_seg = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
    after_seg = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation
    before_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in before_seg['nodes']}
    after_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in after_seg['nodes']}
    # Check if board changed
    changed = False
    for n in after_seg['nodes']:
        if n['id'] in before_nodes:
            if before_nodes[n['id']]['color'] != n['color']:
                changed = True
                print("Changed:", n['id'], before_nodes[n['id']]['color'], '->', n['color'])
    if not changed
